sourceDesc.p: Derived from CDSL MW, PWG, PWK, AP90, GRA, and BEN source records for interoperability analysis.

projectDesc.p: tei-archival-profile-v0.1; TEI is used as the archival/textual model. Raw CDSL records are preserved as escaped source-entry quotes, while selected lexical structures are promoted into TEI entry, form, sense, citation, and relation elements.

revisionDesc.change: Included in the full machine-reviewed TEI profile.

listBibl.head: Machine-extracted citation index; source quotes preserve the archival text.

cit.quote:
<L>45580<pc>260,1<k1>kal<k2>kal<h>2<e>1
<hom>2.</hom> <s>kal</s> ¦ <ab>cl.</ab> 10. <ab>P.</ab> (rarely <ab>Ā.</ab>) <s>kAlayati</s> (<s>˚te</s>), to push on, drive forward, drive before one's self or away, carry off, <ls>MBh.</ls>; <ls>BhP.</ls>;
<div n="to"/>to go after (with hostile intention), persecute, <ls>R. iii, 41, 26</ls>;
<div n="to"/>to count, tell over, <ls>MBh. iii, 14853</ls>;
<div n="to"/>to throw, <ls>L.</ls>;
<div n="to"/>to announce the time (?). <info whitneyroots="kal,17"/><info verb="genuineroot" cp="10P,10Ā"/>
<LEND>

<L>15603<pc>2-0150<k1>kal<k2>kal<h>2
2. {#kal#}¦, {#kala/yati#}
<ls>DHĀTUP. 35,13</ls> ({%gehen, zählen%}).
<div n="1"> 1) {%treiben, antreiben%}: {#daRqopaGAtaM gAH kalayati#}
<ls>P. 3,4,48</ls>, <ab>Sch.</ab>
{#javasya mama paryantaH kiM nu syAditi medinIm . kalayantamiva#} (von einem Pferde in schnellem Laufe)
<ls>KATHĀS. 18,90.</ls> {#ApAne pAnakalitA dEvenABipracoditAH . erakArUpiBirvajrErnijaGnuritaretaram ..#}
<ls>MBH. 1,620.</ls> {#rAkzasA hi suyudDena Bavantvadya raRAjire . AhArakalitAH sarve yugapatkapiBojanAH ..#}
<ls>R. 5,83,10.</ls> {#kAlaH kalayatAmaham (kfzRaH)#}
<ls>BHAG. 10,30.</ls> {#kAlaH kalayatAM praBuH#}
<ls>BHĀG. P. 3,29,38.</ls> <ls>SCHLEGEL</ls> : {%tempus ego numeros modulantium%},
<ls>BURNOUF</ls> : {%le Temps, le plus puissant de ceux qui ont l'empire.%} <ab>Vgl.</ab>
3. {#kal#} .
<div n="1">— 2) {%halten, tragen%}: {#BikzABaktEH karakalitagaNgAmbutaralEH#}
<ls>ŚĀNTIŚ. 4,18.</ls> {#karakalitakapAlaH kuRqalI daRqapARiH#}
<ls>BHAIRAVADHYĀNA</ls> im <ls>ŚKDR.</ls> {#mlecCanivahaniDane kalayasi karabAlam#}
<ls>GĪT. 1,14.</ls> {#halaM kalayate#} (<ab>dat.</ab> des <ab>partic.</ab>)
<ls n="GĪT. 1,">16.</ls> {#kalitalalitavanamAla#}
<ls n="GĪT. 1,">17.</ls> {#kalitakamalA#}
<ls>ŚRUT.</ls> (<ls>BR.) 40.</ls>
<div n="1">— 3) {%thun, machen, bewerkstelligen%}: {#sadA pAnTaH pUzA gaganaparimARaM kalayati#}
<ls>BHARTṚ. 3,20.</ls> {#kzaRAtkalayate#} (<ab>med.</ab>) {#hrIyantraRAM kAmapi#}
<ls>SĀH. D. 40,10.</ls> {#kalayati tilakaM taTA Sakalam#}
<ls n="SĀH. D.">57,18.</ls> {%Etwas irgendwohin thun, irgendwo anbringen%} (oder {%anheften, auflegen, auftragen%}; <ab>vgl.</ab> <ab>u.</ab> — {#A): kalaya valayaSreRIM pARO pade kuru nUpurO#}
<ls>GĪT. 12,26.</ls> {#marakatasakalakalitakalaTOtalipi#}
<ls n="GĪT.">8,4.</ls> einen Laut {%hervorbringen%}: {#maDupakulakalitarAva#}
<ls n="GĪT.">11,19.</ls> {#vihagAH kadambasuraBAviha gAH (= vAcaH) kalayantyanukzaRamanekalayam#}
<ls>ŚIŚ. 4,36.</ls> {#mAdyantaH kalayantu cUtaSiKare kelIpikAH paYcamam#}
<ls>SĀH. D. 79,15.</ls> {#taM ca krIqAkalitalalitAvyaktanarmABilApam#}
<ls>KATHĀS. 23,94.</ls> <ab>Vgl.</ab> {#kala#} .
<div n="1">— 4) {%mit Etwas versehen%}, {#kalita#} {%versehen mit%}: {#anyatkaTamiva pulakEH kalitaM (kalilaM?#}
<ab>Sch.</ab> : = {#yuktaM) mama gAtrakaM karasparSAt#}
<ls>VIKR. 57.</ls> {#DEryakalita#}
<ls>ŚIŚ. 9,59</ls> (<ab>Sch.</ab> = {#kalitaDErya#}).
<div n="1">— 5) {%bemerken, wahrnehmen, in Betracht ziehen%}: {#yadEnAM CAyAdvitIyAM kalayAM cakAra#}
<ls>NAIṢ. 3,12.</ls> {#DanyaH ko 'pi na vikriyAM kalayatiprApte nave yOvane#}
<ls>BHARTṚ. 1,71.</ls>
<ls>RĀJA-TAR. 4,629.</ls>
<ls>ŚIŚ. 9,83.</ls> {#kalita = vedita#}
<ls>H. an. 3,257.</ls> = {#vidita#}
<ls>TRIK. 3,3,154.</ls>
<ls>MED. t. 102.</ls>
<div n="1">— 6) {%für Etwas ansehen, halten%}: {#sa paScAtsaMpUrRaH kalayati#}
(<ab>v. l.</ab> {#gaRayati) DaritrIM tfRasamAm#}
<ls>BHARTṚ. 2,37.</ls> {#idAnImasmAkaM tfRamiva samastaM kalayatAm#}
<ls>ŚĀNTIŚ. 4,15.</ls> {#vyAlanilayamilanena garalamiva kalayati malayasamIram#}
<ls>GĪT. 4,2.</ls> {#kalayAmi valayAdimaRiBUzaRam — bahudUzaRam#}
<ls n="GĪT.">7,7.</ls> <ls>ŚIŚ. 9,58.</ls> {#kalita = gaRita#} ({%gezählt, für Etwas angesehen%})
<ls>ŚABDAR.</ls> im <ls>ŚKDR.</ls>
<div n="1">— 7) <ab>denom.</ab> von {#kali#} ({%ein <ab>best.</ab> Würfel) den%} <is>Kali</is> {%ergreifen%} (<ab>vgl.</ab> {#kftay#})
<ls>P. 3,1,21.</ls>
<ls>VOP. 21,17.</ls> {#acakalat#}
<ls>P.</ls>, <is>Vārtt</is>. <ls>VOP. 8,112.</ls> <ls n="VOP.">21,17.</ls>
<div n="1">— 8) vom <ab>partic.</ab> {#kalita#} kennen die Lexicographen noch <ab>folgg.</ab> <ab>Bedd.</ab>: = {#Apta#} {%erlangt%}
<ls>TRIK. 3,3,154.</ls>
<ls>H. an. 3,257.</ls>
<ls>MED. t. 102</ls> (<ab>vgl.</ab> {#DEryakalita#}
<ls>ŚIŚ. 9,59</ls>, was nach den <ab>Schol.</ab> = {#kalitaDErya#} sein soll). = {#Bedita#} {%gespalten, getrennt%}
<ls>ŚABDAR.</ls> im <ls>ŚKDR.</ls> {%sounded indistinctly, buzzed, murmured, <ab>etc.</ab>%} (<ab>vgl.</ab> {#kala#})
<ls>WILS.</ls> {#kalita#} am Ende eines <ab>comp.</ab> nach einem <ab>subst.</ab> in gleichem Casusverhältniss <is>gaṇa</is> {#kftAdi#} zu <ls>P. 2,1,59.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#ava#}, <ab>partic.</ab> {#avakalita#} {%gesehen, wahrgenommen%}
<ls>DHAR.</ls> im <ls>ŚKDR.</ls> <ab>u.</ab> {#avakalita#} .
<div n="p">— {#vyava#}, {#vyavakalita#} {%abgezogen, subtrahirt%}; <lex>n.</lex> {%Subtraction%}
<ls>LĪLĀV.</ls> im <ls>ŚKDR.</ls>
<div n="v">— <ab>Vgl.</ab> <ab>u.</ab> — {#sam#} .
<div n="p">— {#A#}
<div n="1"> 1) {%schütteln%}: {#mArutAkalitAstatra drumAH#}
<ls>MBH. 1,2853.</ls> {#IzadAkalitaM#} ({%sich schüttelnd, zitternd%}) {#cApi kroDAddrutapadaM sTitam#}
<ls n="MBH.">4,762.</ls> {#keSAnAkalayan (marut)#}
<ls>BHARTṚ. 1,50</ls> (die <ab>var. l.</ab> hat {#Akulayan#}, welches auch wegen des grössern Gleichklangs mit dem folgenden {#mukulayan#} vorzuziehen
[Page2-0151]
ist). {%werfen, schleudern%}
<ls>ŚIŚ. 3,73. 9,72.</ls>
<div n="1">— 2) {%ergreifen, packen%}
<ls>ŚIŚ. 7,21.</ls>
<div n="1">— 3) {%anbinden, befestigen%}: {#saMBramAkalitAMSukA#}
<ls>KATHĀS. 20,52.</ls> {#suvarRasUtrAkalitADarAmbarAm#}
<ls>ŚIŚ. 1,6. 9,45.</ls>
<div n="1">— 4) {%übergeben, übertragen%}: {#svaM dIpaM sapta varzARi viBajya saptavarzanAmaBya AtmajeBya Akalayya#}
<ls>BHĀG. P. 5,20,2.</ls>
<div n="1">— 5) {%wahrnehmen, in Betracht ziehen%}: {#tataH paScAdAyAntaM BayahetumAkalayya manTaro jalaM pravizwaH#}
<ls>HIT. 38,10.</ls> {#KinnamasUyayA hfdayaM tavAkalayAmi#}
<ls>GĪT. 3,7.</ls> {#AtmAnaM ca pravayasamAkalayya vanaM viraktaH prAtizWat#}
<ls>BHĀG. P. 4,9,67.</ls> <ls n="BHĀG. P. 4,">12,16.</ls> {#yaTA paraSurAmamAkalayatu BavatI tAvat#}
<ls>PRAB. 5,5.</ls>
<ab>Sch.</ab> zu <ls>GHAṬ. 22.</ls>
<div n="1">— 6) {%für Etwas ansehen, halten%}
<ls>BHARTṚ. 3,36.</ls> <ls n="BHARTṚ. 3,">81.</ls>
<div n="v">— <ab>Vgl.</ab> {#Akalana#} .
<div n="p">— {#pratyA#} {%aufzählen, herzählen%}: {#pratyAkalitasvadurnayaH#}
<ls>DAŚAK.</ls> in <ls>BENF. Chr. 185,10.</ls> <ls>BENFEY</ls> : {%vorwerfen, anklagen, verurtheilen.%} {#pratyAkalita#}
<div n="1"> 1) {%interposed%};
<div n="1"> 2) {%introduced, as a step in legal process%}
<ls>WILSON.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#ud#} {%losbinden, lösen%}; {#utkalita#} {%losgemacht, der sich losgemacht hat%}: {#sa tasya hastotkalitastadAsuro vikrIqato yadvadahirgarutmataH#}
<ls>BHĀG. P. 7,8,26.</ls> {%eröffnet, aufgeblüht%} (<ab>u.</ab> {#utkalita#} fälschlich: {%mit Knospen bedeckt)%}: {#AliNgitastilaka utkalita ABAti#} ad
<ls>KUMĀRAS. 3,26.</ls> {#praharzavegotkalitAnana#}
<ls>BHĀG. P. 7,8,35.</ls> {#BaktyutkalitAmalAtmanA#}
<ls>BHĀG. P. 1,10,23.</ls> <ls>BURNOUF</ls> : {%avec une intelligence pure et ardente de dévotion.%}
<div n="v">— <ab>Vgl.</ab> {#utkalita, utkalikA#} .
<div n="p">— {#pari#}
<div n="1"> 1) {%sehen, wahrnehmen%}
<ls>NAIṢ. 2,65.</ls> {#aparikalitapUrva#}
<ls>LALITAM.</ls> im <ls>ŚKDR.</ls>
<div n="1">— 2) {%für Etwas ansehen, halten%}
<ls>ŚIŚ. 8,9.</ls> — {#parikalita#} <is>gaṇa</is> {#izwAdi#} zu <ls>P. 5,2,88</ls>
; davon {#parikalitin#} <ab>ebend.</ab>
<div n="p">— {#sam#} {%aufhäufen (?)%}: {#saMkalayati kAlayati vA BUtAnIti kAlaH#}
<ls>SUŚR. 1,18,20.</ls> <ab>partic.</ab> {#saMkalita#} (davon {#saMkalitin#}) <is>gaṇa</is> {#izwAdi#} zu <ls>P. 5,2,88.</ls>
{%aufgehäuft%}
<ls>AK. 3,2,42.</ls>
<ls>H. 1485.</ls> {%addirt%}, <lex>n.</lex> {%Addition%}
<ls>LĪLĀV.</ls> im <ls>ŚKDR.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#pratyAsam#} {%nach verschiedenen Indicien schliessen%}: {#anumAnaM pratyAsaMkalitam#}
<ls>VYAVAHĀRAT. 38,18.</ls>
<LEND>

<L>25348<pc>2-032-a<k1>kal<k2>kal<h>2 <hom>2.</hom> √{#kal#}¦, {#kalayati#} (selten <ab>Med.</ab>) <div n="1">— 1〉 {%treiben, antreiben%} <ls>HEMĀDRI 1,763,9</ls>. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%halten, tragen%}. <div n="1">— 3〉 {%sich hinbegeben zu%} (<ab>Acc.</ab>). {#vimAnakalitavyoman#} <ls>NAIṢ. 2,104</ls>. <div n="1">— 4〉 {%thun, machen, bewerkstelligen%}. {#mUrCAm#} so <ab>v. a.</ab> {%in Ohnmacht fallen%} <ls>BĀLAR. 168,17</ls>. {#culukaMjalasya#} {%einen Schluck Wasser thun%} <ls n="Chr.">74,13</ls>. <div n="1">— 5〉 (einen Laut) {%hervorbringen, ertönen lassen, anstimmen%} <ls>NAIṢ. 12,106</ls>. <div n="1">— 6〉 {%thun,%} so <ab>v. a.</ab> {%auflegen, anheften, anbringen%}. <div n="1">— 7〉 {%bemerken, gewahrwerden%}. {#tUzRIm#} {%stillschweigend aufnehmen%} <ls>Spr. 1041</ls>. <div n="1">— 8〉 {%annehmen, meinen%} <ls>Spr. 4017</ls>. {%glauben an%} <ls n="Spr.">7017</ls>. {%beachten%} <ls>BĀLAR. 108,15</ls>. {%halten für%} (mit zwei <ab>Acc.</ab>) <ls>Chr. 310,16</ls>. {%erkennen als%} (mit zwei <ab>Acc.</ab>) <ls>Spr. 7783</ls>. <div n="1">— 9〉 {#kalita#} <div n="2">— a〉 {%versehen mit%} (im <ab>Comp.</ab> vorangehend) <ls>BHĀVAPR. 1,68</ls>. <div n="2">— b〉 *= {#Bedita#}. <ab>Vgl.</ab> {#kalay#}. <div n="p">— Mit *{#ava#}, {#˚kalita#} {%gesehen, wahrgenommen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#vyava#}, {#˚kalita#} {%abgezogen, subtrahirt%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#A#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%Schütteln%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%festhalten%} <ls>MBH. 4,22,65</ls>. <ls>ŚIŚ. 9,72</ls>. <div n="1">— 3〉 {%befestigen, anbinden%}. <div n="1">— 4〉 {%annehmen%}. {#mUrtim#} <ls>NYĀYAM. S. 1, Śl. 3</ls>. <div n="1">— 5〉 {%übergeben%}. <div n="1">— 6〉 {%erkennen, wahrnehmen, finden%}. {#AkalayitrI#} <ls>NAIṢ. 5,70</ls>. <div n="1">— 7〉 {%prüfen, untersuchen%} <ls n="Chr.">120,14</ls>. <ls>Spr. 3311</ls>. {#dfSA#} <ls n="Chr.">68,18</ls>. <div n="1">— 8〉 {%bei sich denken, eine Betrachtung anstellen%} <ls n="Chr.">127,12</ls>. <div n="1">— 9〉 {%annehmen, [Page2-032-b] glauben an%} <ls n="Chr.">43,17</ls>. halten für (mit zwei <ab>Acc.</ab>; beim zweiten <ab>Acc.</ab> auch {#iva#}) <ls>NAIṢ. 5,31</ls>. <ls>ŚIŚ. 3,73</ls>. <ls>Spr. 7621</ls>. <div n="p">— Mit {#pratyA#} {%aufzählen, herzählen%}. <ab>Vgl.</ab> {#pratyAkalita#}. <div n="p">— Mit {#ud#}, {#utkalita#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%losgemacht, — gelassen%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%aufgeblüht, blühend%}. <div n="1">— 3〉 {%strahlend von%} (im <ab>Comp.</ab> vorangehend), {%von den Augen, vom Gesicht und von der Seele%}. <div n="1">— 4〉 {%zu Tage getreten%}. <div n="1">— 5〉 *{%sehnsüchtig;%} <ab>Vgl.</ab> <ls>Comm. zu BHĀG. P. 1,10,23</ls>. <div n="1">— 6〉 *{%gedeihend%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#pari#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%ergreifen%} <ls>BĀLAR. 258,2</ls>. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%in sich aufnehmen, verschlingen%} <ls>KĀD. 140,1</ls>. <ls>HARṢAC. 123,23</ls>. <div n="1">— 3〉 {%ansehen —, halten für%}. <div n="1">— 4〉 {#˚kalita#} {%umlegt —, umgeben mit%} (im <ab>Comp.</ab> vorangehend) <ls>BHĀVAPR. 1,69</ls>. <ls>HARṢAC. 122,6. 183,17</ls>. <div n="p">— Mit {#sam#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%zusammenthun, — fügen, — fassen%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%addiren%} <ls>GAṆIT. 1,28</ls>. <div n="1">— 3〉 {%der Meinung sein%} <ls>Spr. 1531</ls>. <div n="p">— Mit {#pratyAsam#} in {#pratyAsaMkalita#}. <div n="p">— Mit {#utsam#}, {#utsaMkalita#} {%angetrieben, beauftragt%} <ls>KĀD. II,40,20</ls>. <LEND>

<L>10456<pc>0385-b<k1>kal<k2>kal
{#kal#}¦ {vI.v} {c1c} <ab>A.</ab> ({#kalate, kalita#}) {@1@} To
count. {@--2@} To sound. {vII.v} {c10c} <ab>U.</ab>
({#kalayati-te, kalita#}) {@1@} To hold, bear,
carry, wield, have, put on;  <lbinfo n="karAlaka#rakaMdalIkalitaSastrajAlErbalEH"/>
{#karAlakarakaMdalIkalitaSastrajAlErbalEH#} <ls>U. 5. 5</ls>;
{#mlecCanivahaniDane kalayasi karavAlaM#} <ls>Gīt. 1</ls>;
{#kalitalalitavanamAlaH; halaM kalayate#} {%<ab>ibid.</ab>%};
{#kalaya valayaSreRIM pARO pade kuru nUpurO#} <ls n="Gīt.">12</ls>;
<ls>Śānti. 4. 18.</ls> {@--2@} ({%a%}) To count, <lbinfo n="re+ckon"/>
reckon; {#kAlaH kalayatAmahaM#} <ls>Bg. 10. 30</ls>
({%b%}) To measure, {#sadA pAMTaH pUzA#} <lbinfo n="gaganapa#rimARaM"/>
{#gaganaparimARaM kalayati#} <ls>Bh. 2. 114.</ls> {@--3@} To <lbinfo n="assu+me"/>
assume, take, have, possess; {#kalayati hi#}
{#himAMSornizkalaMkasya lakzmIM#} <ls>Māl. 1. 22</ls>;
<ls>Śi. 4. 36</ls>, <ls n="Śi.">9. 59.</ls> {@--4@} To know, <lbinfo n="under+stand"/>
understand, observe, take notice of,
think of; {#kalayannapi savyaTo'vatasTe#}  <lbinfo n="ls:Śi.+ 9. 83"/>
<ls>Śi. 9. 83</ls>; {#kopitaM virahaKeditacittA#} <lbinfo n="kAMta#meva"/>
{#kAMtameva kalayaMtyanuninye#} <ls n="Śi.">10. 29</ls>; <ls>N. 2. 65</ls>,
<ls n="N.">3. 12</ls>, <ls>Māl. 2. 9.</ls> {@--5@} To think, <lbinfo n="re+gard"/>
regard, consider; {#kalayedamAnamanasaM saKi#}
{#mAM#} <ls>Śi. 9. 58</ls>, <ls n="Śi.">6. 54</ls>, <ls n="Śi.">15. 55</ls>, <ls n="Śi.">16. 64</ls>;
<ls>Śānti. 4. 15</ls>; {#vyAlanilayamilanena#} <lbinfo n="garala#miva"/>
{#garalamiva kalayati malayasamIraM#} <ls>Gīt. 4</ls>, <ls n="Gīt.">7.</ls> {@--6@}
To undergo, be influenced by;  <lbinfo n="mada#lIlAkalitakAmapAla"/>
{#madalIlAkalitakAmapAla#} <ls>Māl. 8</ls>; {#DanyaH#} <lbinfo n="ko#pi"/>
{#kopi na vikriyAM kalayati prApte nave yOvane#}
<ls>Bh. 1. 72.</ls> {@--7@} To do, perform. {@--8@}
To go. {@--9@} To attach to, tie on;
furnish with. {@--10@} To urge on, <lbinfo n="im+pel"/>
impel, incite; <ls>Māl. 9. 41.</ls> {@--11@} To utter
a sound, murmur. {@--12@} To take hold
of the die called Kali. {vIII.v} {c10c} <ab>P.</ab>
({#kAlayati, kAlita#}) {@1@} To push on,
urge, drive forward. {@--2@} To carry
off. {@--3@} To collect. {@--4@} To throw,
cast. {@--5@} To proclaim the time.
<LEND>

<L>3069<pc>0166-b<k1>kal<k2>kal 2. {#kal#}¦ {%KAL%} (akin to {%kṛ%}), 1. 10, in three forms, {%kalaya, kalāpaya,%} and {%kālaya,%} <ab>Par.</ab> ({%kālaya%} <ab>Ātm.</ab> <ls>Rām.</ls> 4, 18, 28): {%kalaya,%} {@1.@} To impel, <ls>Kathās.</ls> 18, 90; {%kālaya,%} to drive, <ls>MBh.</ls> 4, 1007, <ls>Bhāg. P.</ls> 3, 30, 1. {%kalita,%} Incited by, <ls>Śiś.</ls> 9, 59; greedy of, <ls>Rām.</ls> 5, 83, 10. {@<ab>Comp.</ab>@} {%Dhairya-,%} <ab>adj.</ab> steady, calm. -- {@2.@} {%kālaya,%} To drive onwards, <ls>MBh.</ls> 1, 6690; to pursue, <ls>Rām.</ls> 4, 18, 28. {@3.@} {%kālaya,%} To provoke, <ls>Rām.</ls> 3, 41, 26. {@4.@} etc. {%kalaya,%} To bear, <ls>Gīt.</ls> 1, 16. {@5.@} To perform, <ls>Bhartṛ.</ls> 3, 20. {@6.@} To put in, to fasten, <ls>Gīt.</ls> 12, 26. {@7.@} To utter, <ls>Gīt.</ls> 11, 9. {@8.@} To endow, <ls>Śiś.</ls> 9, 59. {@9.@} To reckon, <ls>Bhartṛ.</ls> 2, 37. {@10.@} To perceive, <ls>Śiś.</ls> 9, 83. {@11.@} To consider, <ls>Śiś.</ls> 9, 58. {@12.@} † To go: <ab>cf.</ab> {%ud.%} -- With the <ab>prep.</ab> {#A#} {%ā: kalaya,%} {@1.@} To shake, [Page0167-a+ 42] <ls>MBh.</ls> 1. 2853. {@2.@} To catch, <ls>Śiś.</ls> 9, 72. {@3.@} To fasten, <ls>Kathās.</ls> 20, 52; <ls>Śiś.</ls> 9, 45. {@4.@} To surrender, <ls>Bhāg. P.</ls> 5, 20, 2. {@5.@} To regard, <ls>Prab.</ls> 5, 5. {@6.@} To per- ceive, <ls>Hit.</ls> 38, 10. -- With {#pratyA#} {%prati-ā,%} {%kalaya,%} To enumerate one by one, <ls>Daśak.</ls> in <ls>Chr.</ls> 185, 10. -- With {#ud#} {%ud,%} {@I.@} {%kalaya,%} To loosen, to deliver, <ls>Bhāg. P.</ls> 7, 8, 26; {%utkalita,%} {@1.@} Opened, <ls>Pañc.</ls> 184, 18 (where {%kāl˚%} must be changed to {%kal˚%}). {@2.@} Joyful, <ls>Bhāg. P.</ls> 7, 8, 34. {@II.@} {%kalāpaya,%} To beg for dismission, <ls>Pañc.</ls> 244, 25. -- With {#pari#} {%pari,%} {@I.@} {%kālaya,%} To pursue, <ls>MBh.</ls> 15, 1060. {@II.@} {%kalaya,%} To reckon, <ls>Śiś.</ls> 8, 9. To perceive, <ls>Naiṣ.</ls> 2, 54. -- With {#pra#} {%pra, kālaya,%} {@1.@} To drive onwards, <ls>MBh.</ls> 1, 7178. {@2.@} To pursue, 3, 10778. -- With {#sam#} {%sam, kālaya,%} {@1.@} To drive, <ls>Hariv.</ls> 1191. {@2.@} To put to flight, <ls>MBh.</ls> 4, 1981. -- <ab>Cf.</ab> <ab>Lat.</ab> celer, cello, procella; <lang n="greek">κέλλω, ὀκέλλω, κέλης, κέλομαι, κελεύω, κολετράω</lang>; <ab>O.H.G.</ab> halôn, holôn, holên. <LEND>
